Event: The Runic Adventure
Event Date: 08/07/2025
Sage Bot Item Code: M23
Ashborn Mace

When attacking, has a 40% chance of stunning an enemy for 3 sec.
Once in a while the unit deals a crushing blow to the target, and it also affects all enemy units in a large radius around them. These units have the following effects applied to them:
- Damage dealt to them is increased by 40% for 5 sec.
- All their stats are reduced by 40% for 5 sec.
They also take physical damage equal to 30% of their max health every second for 5 sec.

Requirements: 98-100

User rating: item not rated yet

First trigger: 5 sec

Cooldown: 9 secs
